Organization Chart

Leadership & Staff Directory

🏛

Your Organization Chart

This page displays your organization's leadership structure and staff directory. Customize this file with your union's officers, directors, coordinators, and chapter leadership.

The chart supports dark/light mode, expandable sections, editable contact info (steward-only), and localStorage persistence for local edits.

Edit org_chart.html to add your organization's structure
Organization Chart — SolidBase
